response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified it as a music video featuring Kaela Kovalskia. 2. Identified the song title as 'dah lah.' from the on-screen credits. 3. Mapped the scenes: a singing segment (00:00-02:40), a non-singing dialogue segment (02:40-03:06), and a final singing segment with credits (03:06-04:42). 4. Searched for official lyrics of 'dah lah.' by Kaela Kovalskia using the identified composer/artist metadata and found both the Indonesian original and an English translation. 5. Compiled the data into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video is a music video for Kaela Kovalskia's song 'dah lah.'. It features an animated character walking through a museum-like space filled with pictures depicting various scenes, followed by a brief, dazed dialogue segment, and finally, a montage of clips over the rest of the song with rolling end credits.

scenes.description: The character walks through a gallery filled with pictures on the walls while singing the first verse and chorus of 'dah lah.'.

Saat dunia tak berjalan semestinya
Oh, oh

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Isn't this a thing that you're used to? (Used to)
Disappointed and feeling blue (Feeling blue)
When the world doesn't go the way you want it to
Oh, oh
And maybe now is just the perfect time (Perfect time)
To let it go and just unwind (Unwind)
There's no need to ask why ever again

Just let it go, the answer you've been looking for (For)
No need to be sad about it, just try to get through your day (To get through your day)
Just let it go, then maybe in the end you'll know
You got what it takes to get through the ache and still win the day

Dahlah saja, oh, dahlah saja
Walk it off and go
Dahlah saja, oh, dahlah saja
Walk it off and go

What else can you do?
When your feelings are barely there (Are barely there)
Up to a point of pure despair (Pure despair)
When you have given it your all, but ends in vain

Just let it go (Let it go), the answer you've been looking for
No need to be sad about it, just try to get through your day (To get through your day)
Just let it go, then maybe in the end you'll know
You got what it takes to get through the ache and still win the day

Let life take over the wheel
And shift it to higher gears
Then you will finally see

Just let it go, the answer you've been looking for
You don't need to be sad, you don't need to be mad
Just try to get through your day
Just let it go, then maybe in the end you'll know
You got what it takes to get through the ache and still win the day
You got what it takes to get through the ache and still win the day

Dahlah saja, oh, dahlah saja
Walk it off and go
Dahlah saja, oh, dahlah saja
Walk it off and go

scenes.description: A transitional scene featuring a '#3DJAVU' graphic. The character speaks English, appearing confused and dazed. There is no singing.
The song resumes. End credits scroll over various animated clips of Hololive characters.
